caption: The video displays a static webpage for TFNN, featuring a navigation bar with links for "HOME," "TIGER TV," "NEWSLETTERS," "SERVICES," "ABOUT," and "ADVERTISING." A header statement declares, "TFNN teaches traders and investors of all skill levels investing systems, strategies, and techniques allowing them to successfully trade the financial markets," followed by the phrase, "Get the training you need to protect and grow your money." Under a "Featured Content" heading, three promotional tiles are visible. The first tile features a blue background with the text "TIGER'S DEN TRADING ROOM" and the "TFNN.COM" logo. The middle tile highlights a webinar by Tom O'Brien titled "Timing The Trade All Day Webinar" scheduled for "Friday, June 10th Live from 9 a.m. - 2 p.m. ET." The third tile is labeled "The Gold Report" and features a photo of Tom O'Brien against a background of gold bars and stock market data. There is no visible movement or change across the frames.
